summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Velocity-One Cognitive Task Engine with focus on theme toggle, authentication, task management, AI insights, and UI functionality. All core features working correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: Dropdown selection in modals occasionally has timing issues with force clicks

design_issues.issue: Priority borders working correctly - rose-500 (high), amber-500 (medium), teal-500 (low)

passed_tests: Theme toggle on auth page (light/dark switching)
Theme persistence across page reloads using localStorage
User registration with unique email generation
Dashboard loading with stat cards (Active Tasks, Completed, Velocity, Streak)
Energy slider functionality (value changes from 5 to 7)
Task creation with default settings
Task form input validation and submission
AI Audit button triggering insights generation
AI Insights modal displaying comprehensive analysis (TOP RECOMMENDATIONS, DELEGATION ALERT, PATTERN INSIGHT)
Task completion updating telemetry counters
Theme toggle in dashboard header
User menu dropdown functionality
Logout functionality redirecting to login page
Session management (automatic logout after timeout)
Priority color-coded borders on task items
Telemetry display (Deep Work Streak, Cognitive Match, Tasks Completed)
Velocity score display in header
Category badges with color coding
Responsive design elements
All backend APIs (15/15 tests passed from previous iteration)

success_percentage.frontend: 98% (all major functionality working, minor dropdown timing issue)
